# Test Cases — elemental-hunter

**Generated by**: agent_qc
**Source GDD**: design/GDD-FEATURE-elemental-hunter.md
**Date**: 2026-03-19
**Hash**: E6FCF660F255D5F37111625D17EEBC37

---

## Overview

This test suite validates the Elemental Hunter game feature based on GDD sections 4 (Edge Cases) and 8 (Test Scenarios).

---

## Core Mechanics Tests (Section 2)

### Token Movement & Board Navigation
- [ ] Test token moves correct number of steps on Arm Path
- [ ] Test token follows Main Loop clockwise direction
- [ ] Test Branch Point routing (own token → Goal Path, opponent → Main Loop)
- [ ] Test token stops at Final Goal when overshooting
- [ ] Test token cannot move if frozen (`frozenRounds > 0`)
- [ ] Test token cannot move to occupied tile (same team) on non-Safe Zone

### Element Collection
- [ ] Given horse on Elemental tile with Affinity match, When landing, Then ATK increased by `character.atk`
- [ ] Given horse on Elemental tile with different element, When landing, Then MAG increased by `character.mag`
- [ ] Given `tileGainMultiplier = ×2`, When collecting element, Then reward is doubled
- [ ] Given full Element Queue (`maxElementQueue` reached), When adding new element, Then oldest element (head) is removed

### Power Roll
- [ ] Given Power Roll mode active, When dice roll result falls in target range (20% probability), Then action succeeds
- [ ] Given Power Roll mode active, When dice roll result outside target range (80% probability), Then action fails
- [ ] Given `consecutiveRollsThisTurn >= MAX_CONSECUTIVE_ROLLS`, When trying to roll, Then roll is rejected (cap reached)

### Roll Double & Cooldown
- [ ] Given player rolls doubles (2 dice same number), When outside cooldown, Then extra turn granted
- [ ] Given player rolls doubles during `doubleRollCooldown`, When resolving, Then no extra turn granted (cooldown blocks)
- [ ] After successful double roll, `doubleRollCooldown` set to 2 rounds
- [ ] `consecutiveRollsThisTurn` increments on each roll (normal + extra), resets when player changes

### Combo System (C3 & C4)
- [ ] Given Element Queue = [Fire, Fire, Fire], When adding Fire, Then C3 (Triple Threat) triggers: 3 Fire removed, all tokens +150 ATK (Tier 1)
- [ ] Given Element Queue = [Fire, Ice, Grass, Rock], When adding different element, Then C4 (Elemental Master) triggers: 4 distinct elements removed, Tier 1 reward applied
- [ ] C3 has priority over C4 (scan left-to-right, trigger first match)
- [ ] After combo triggers, queue rescanned for cascading combos
- [ ] Tier 2 reward (`tileGainMultiplier ×2`) activates at combo milestone 2 (Level 2+)
- [ ] Tier 3 reward (ATK ×1.5, round up) activates at combo milestone 3 (Level 3+)
- [ ] `comboCount` resets to 0 at match start

### Kick Mechanism
- [ ] Given Horse A lands on tile with opponent Horse B (non-Safe Zone), When resolving, Then `HP[B] -= ATK[A]`
- [ ] Given Horse A kicks Horse B, When resolving, Then Horse B pushed back to nearest Safe Zone behind (following B's movement direction)
- [ ] Given `ATK[A] = 0`, When kicking, Then no HP damage but B still pushed back
- [ ] Given Horse A lands on tile with opponent Horse B on Safe Zone, When resolving, Then no Kick occurs

### HP & KO
- [ ] Given player HP reduced to ≤ 0, When checking win condition, Then opponent wins immediately (KO)
- [ ] HP only changes from Kick or Goal tile attack (per GDD)

### MAG & Ultimate
- [ ] Given horse lands on non-Affinity element, When landing, Then `player.mag += character.mag` (respecting `tileGainMultiplier`)
- [ ] Given `mag >= 50`, When activating Ultimate, Then `ultimateExtraRolls++` (cost paid, extra roll granted)
- [ ] After turn ends, if `ultimateExtraRolls > 0`, Then consume 1 and grant new dice roll turn

### Artifact (Empty Tile)
- [ ] Given horse lands on Empty Tile, When resolving, Then Artifact selection popup appears (unlocked artifacts only)
- [ ] Given `emptyTileVisits = 1`, When accessing Artifact, Then Swap is unlocked and available
- [ ] Given `emptyTileVisits = 2`, When accessing Artifact, Then Change is unlocked and available
- [ ] Given `emptyTileVisits = 3`, When accessing Artifact, Then Charge is unlocked and available
- [ ] Given Artifact Level Lv1 (1 slot), When selecting, Then only 1 artifact can be chosen per visit
- [ ] Given Artifact Level Lv2, When selecting, Then up to 2 artifacts available
- [ ] Given Artifact Level Lv3, When selecting, Then up to 3 artifacts available
- [ ] Given queue has < 2 elements, When player selects Swap, Then Swap has no effect (artifact ignored, queue unchanged)
- [ ] Swap artifact: exchanges 2 adjacent elements in queue (player chooses which pair)
- [ ] Change artifact: converts 1 chosen element to any of the other 3 types
- [ ] Charge artifact: adds 1 Affinity element to end of queue

### Game End Conditions
- [ ] Given `currentRound = maxRounds`, When checking, Then player with higher HP wins
- [ ] Given HP tie at round limit, When determining winner, Then Player2 wins (Last Mover Advantage)

---

## Edge Cases (Section 4)

### Queue Management
- [ ] When element added to full queue, oldest (head) element removed before checking combos
- [ ] Combos cascade: after removing combo elements, rescans queue until no more combos
- [ ] Combo removal leaves gaps; subsequent scan should not skip positions

### Concurrency & State
- [ ] Two tokens from same player landing on same tile in same turn: both process independently
- [ ] Two tokens from different players on same tile (non-Safe Zone): Kick triggers for each landing sequence
- [ ] Token already on Final Goal: no additional effect if visited again (already counted)

### Power Roll Edge Cases
- [ ] Power Roll with no target range selected: dice roll ignored (no movement)
- [ ] Target range selection persists only for current dice roll; resets after resolution

### Level & Configuration
- [ ] Level Lv1: `maxRounds = 12`, max Combo Tier = 1, Artifact slots = 1
- [ ] Level Lv2: `maxRounds = 15`, max Combo Tier = 2, Artifact slots = 2
- [ ] Level Lv3: `maxRounds = 15`, max Combo Tier = 3, Artifact slots = 3

### Artifact Selection Edge Cases
- [ ] Unlocking artifacts: visits count persists across turns; artifact becomes available immediately upon reaching threshold
- [ ] If multiple artifacts unlocked, player can choose any available; unused artifacts remain available for future visits
- [ ] Artifact selection is optional? (Assume mandatory selection if available) — verify design

### Kick & Safe Zone Interactions
- [ ] Kick from Final Goal: Does Goal tile attack happen before or after kick? Need to define order
- [ ] Safe Zone definition: Start tile is Safe Zone; Goal Path tiles before Final Goal? Clarify if Goal Path is Safe Zone (presumably not)
- [ ] If Safe Zone occupied by teammate, kick target still pushed to that Safe Zone? Need stacking rule

### Ultimate & Cooldown Interaction
- [ ] If `mag >= 50` but `consecutiveRollsThisTurn >= MAX_CONSECUTIVE_ROLLS`, can Ultimate trigger? GDD says "Ultimate Extra Roll" also affected by cap (Section 2.12 implies; Section 2.5 says cap applies to all rolls)
- [ ] After Ultimate grants extra roll, `consecutiveRollsThisTurn` increments; cap may prevent further extra rolls

### Double Roll Cooldown Precision
- [ ] Cooldown rounds counted per-player; checked at start of double roll resolution
- [ ] Cooldown decrements at end of each full round (both players complete turn)

---

## Test Scenarios from GDD Section 8

1. **Element affinity collection**: Given horse on element matching affinity, when landing, then +ATK
2. **Non-affinity MAG gain**: Given horse on element not matching affinity, when landing, then +MAG
3. **C3 combo trigger**: Given queue [F,F,F], when adding F, then combo triggers, all tokens +150 ATK
4. **Kick damage and push**: Given attacker A with ATK>0 on non-Safe Zone with opponent B, when landing, then B loses HP and pushed to nearest Safe Zone behind
5. **Final Goal attack**: Given horse reaches Final Goal, when resolving, then select element to add to queue, attack opponent (damage = ATK), then return to Safe Zone
6. **Consecutive roll cap**: Given `consecutiveRollsThisTurn = 3`, when rolling double, then no extra turn granted
7. **Artifact Swap with 1 element**: Given queue has single element, when selecting Swap, then no effect (artifact wasted)
8. **Frozen token movement**: Given token `frozenRounds > 0`, when turn starts, then token not selectable

---

## Notes for Implementation

- Mock dependencies: `EventBus`, `GameState`, `Board`, `Token`, `DiceRoll`, `ElementQueue`, `Player`
- Use Jest fake timers if round-based cooldowns need time simulation
- Ensure deterministic tests: set RNG seeds for dice/draw randomness
- Test both client-side state updates and server-side validation (if applicable)

---

**End of Test Plan**
